heading: Domestic Policy Staff and Office of Administration; personnel
label: 107 Domestic Policy Staff and Office of Administration; personnel
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 107, , , providing that employees of the executive departments and independent establishments of the executive branch of the Government might be detailed from time to time to the White House Office for temporary assistance, was repealed by . In addition to any authority granted under paragraph (1) of this subsection, the President (or his designee) is authorized to employ individuals in the Office of Administration in accordance with and provisions relating thereto. Any individual so employed under the authority granted under such section 3101 shall be subject to the limitation specified in .section 3101 of title 5section 114 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated each fiscal year such sums as may be necessary for the official expenses of the Domestic Policy Staff and the Office of Administration.
